description: Detects deep property chains (4+ levels) in JavaScript without optional chaining (?.). Simplified from Rust: flags member_expression nodes whose object is itself a member_expression nested at least 2 levels deep (indicating 4+ segments). Cannot detect optional_chain_expression usage or filter safe root globals. All 4+ deep chains flagged regardless of root.

flag.message: Deep property chain detected (4+ levels) without optional chaining -- consider using `?.` to handle null/undefined safely
